article.description: — Stephen Curry scored 23 points and knocked down a key 3-pointer with 3:45 left to help seal it, Jimmy Butler added 14 points, nine assists and nine rebounds, and the Golden State Warriors beat the Dallas Mavericks 126-116 on Thursday.
article.headline: Stephen Curry, Jimmy Butler lead the way as Warriors beat Mavericks 126-116 on Christmas Day

images.caption: Steph Curry gets in the lane and scores to reach 26,000 career points for the Warriors.
images.name: Steph Curry notches his 26,000th career point

article.linkText: Stephen Curry, Jimmy Butler lead the way as Warriors beat Mavericks 126-116 on Christmas Day
article.story: SAN FRANCISCO -- — Stephen Curry scored 23 points and knocked down a key 3-pointer with 3:45 left to help seal it, Jimmy Butler added 14 points, nine assists and nine rebounds, and the Golden State Warriors beat the Dallas Mavericks 126-116 on Thursday. Mavericks rookie star Cooper Flagg had 27 points on 13-for-21 shooting, six rebounds and five assists in his Christmas Day debut while Brandon Williams scored 26 off the bench. Klay Thompson returned to face his former Warriors team in the holiday matinee after missing Tuesday's home game against the Nuggets with soreness in his left knee. And former Splash Brother Curry kept sneaking a peek of Thompson's warmup before they met at midcourt for a greeting and embrace. Thompson received a warm ovation when he entered the game for the first time with 5:51 remaining in the opening quarter. Mavericks center Anthony Davis didn't return after exiting in the second quarter with groin spasms. Davis had three points, three rebounds and two blocked shots in 11 minutes. Draymond Green started and contributed seven points and five rebounds playing in foul trouble two days after he and coach Steve Kerr had a heated exchange during a third-quarter timeout against Orlando — with both later apologizing to each other. Golden State started 0 for 6 from 3-point range before the Mavericks even attempted their first shot from deep. Moses Moody connected at the 6:05 mark of the first quarter and that helped the Warriors get going — along with Al Horford. Horford returned from a seven-game absence because of sciatica in his right leg. He came in at the 5:27 mark of the first and made all four of his 3-pointers as the Warriors led 40-28 after one quarter. He finished with 14 points, De'Anthony Melton scored 16 and Brandin Podziemski contributed 13 points, eight rebounds and four assists off the bench. Up next The Mavericks play at Sacramento on Saturday while the Warriors hit the road to face Toronto on Sunday. ------ AP NBA: https://apnews.com/NBA

videos.description: The Warriors win their third straight game with a victory over the Mavericks on Christmas.
videos.headline: Warriors cruise past Mavs on Christmas Day

tracking.trackingName: COM_NBA Highlight (Warriors cruise past Mavs on Christmas Day) 2025/12/25 ESHEET

videos.description: Gary Payton II wraps a pass around Cooper Flagg to Moses Moody for a Warriors bucket.
videos.headline: Gary Payton II throws a beautiful dime to Moses Moody

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Gary Payton II throws a beautiful dime to Moses Moody) 2025/12/25 ESHEET

videos.description: Al Horford starts off hot for the Warriors with four 3-pointers made.
videos.headline: Al Horford buries 4 3s in the first quarter

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Al Horford buries 4 3s in the first quarter) 2025/12/25 ESHEET

videos.description: Brandin Podziemski finds Moses Moody on a Warriors fast break for a score.
videos.headline: Brandin Podziemski lofts it to Moses Moody for lay-in

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Brandin Podziemski lofts it to Moses Moody for lay-in) 2025/12/25 ESHEET

videos.description: Jimmy Butler passes to a cutting Trayce Jackson-Davis to lay it in for Golden State.
videos.headline: Jimmy Butler slips it to Trayce Jackson-Davis for a Warriors bucket

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jimmy Butler slips it to Trayce Jackson-Davis for a Warriors bucket) 2025/12/25 ESHEET

videos.description: Brandin Podziemski gets a 3-pointer to go for the Warriors after a feed from Jimmy Butler.
videos.headline: Jimmy Butler swings it for a Brandin Podziemski 3

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jimmy Butler swings it for a Brandin Podziemski 3) 2025/12/25 ESHEET

videos.description: Anthony Davis is unable to finish the game for the Mavericks vs. the Warriors with a groin injury.
videos.headline: AD leaves game with a groin injury

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (AD leaves game with a groin injury) 2025/12/25 ESHEET

videos.description: De'Anthony Melton misses a 3-point attempt then steals the ball for a Warriors layup plus the foul.
videos.headline: De'Anthony Melton strips the ball for a Warriors and-1

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (De'Anthony Melton strips the ball for a Warriors and-1) 2025/12/25 ESHEET

videos.description: Cooper Flagg rises up to slam it in for the Mavericks.
videos.headline: Cooper Flagg goes vertical for a Mavs stuff

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Cooper Flagg goes vertical for a Mavs stuff) 2025/12/25 ESHEET

videos.description: Gary Payton II elevates and swats Cooper Flagg's shot with two hands.
videos.headline: Gary Payton II uses two hands for Cooper Flagg rejection

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Gary Payton II uses two hands for Cooper Flagg rejection) 2025/12/25 ESHEET

videos.description: Klay Thompson turns defense into offense with a steal and assist to Brandon Williams for a Mavericks layup and foul.
videos.headline: Klay sets up Brandon Williams for the Mavs and-1

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Klay sets up Brandon Williams for the Mavs and-1) 2025/12/25 ESHEET

videos.description: Steph Curry hits a pull-up 3-pointer for Golden State.
videos.headline: Steph Curry knocks down an effortless 3

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Steph Curry knocks down an effortless 3) 2025/12/25 ESHEET
